name: promptus
description: Promptus — a file-based research knowledge system for Claude Code: a substrate for the LLM agent that stores / keeps / retrieves a project's knowledge as gated markdown, navigable by status and a [[link]] graph. grannie is the human read-port; the humanizer is a bundled style toolkit.

plugins.name: promptus
plugins.description: Store / keep / retrieve a research project's knowledge as gated markdown — a substrate for the LLM agent; grannie is the human read-port (plain-language, grounded answers), the humanizer a bundled style toolkit.
